objectSets.name: First Pass - Insert/Upsert with Draft Status

objects.query: SELECT Name, ProductCode, StockKeepingUnit, UsageModelType FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Description, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, Name, Type FROM RateCard ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT PriceBookId, RateCardId, RateCardType, PriceBook.Name, RateCard.Name FROM PriceBookRateCard WHERE RateCard.Name IN ('AT&T Mobile Plan Rate Card', 'Cloud Storage Pro Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Tier Rate Card') ORDER BY PriceBook.Name ASC, RateCard.Name ASC, RateCardType ASC

SELECT DefaultUnitOfMeasureClassId, DefaultUnitOfMeasureId, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, Rate, RateCardId, RateNegotiation, RateUnitOfMeasureClassId, RateUnitOfMeasureId, Status, UsageResourceId, Product.StockKeepingUnit, RateCard.Name, UsageResource.Name FROM RateCardEntry WHERE RateCard.Name IN ('AT&T Mobile Plan Rate Card', 'Cloud Storage Pro Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Tier Rate Card') ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, RateCard.Name ASC, UsageResource.Name ASC

SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, LowerBound, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, RateCardEntryId, RateCardEntryStatus, RateUnitOfMeasureName, RateUnitOfMeasureId, UpperBound, UsageResourceId, Product.StockKeepingUnit, RateCardEntry.Name, RateUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode, UsageResource.Code FROM RateAdjustmentByTier WHERE RateCardEntry.RateCard.Name IN ('AT&T Mobile Plan Rate Card', 'Cloud Storage Pro Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Rate Card', 'API Access Premium Tier Rate Card') ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, RateCardEntry.Name ASC, UsageResource.Code ASC, RateUnitOfMeasure.UnitCode ASC
